title: Shading Simulation
description: Move the sun through the year and watch obstructions shade the array.

steps.title: The site model
steps.description: Buildings and obstructions are drawn to scale.
steps.voiceScript: This is your site with its buildings and obstructions drawn to scale.
steps.captionText: This is your site with its buildings and obstructions drawn to scale.
steps.fallbackMessage: The site model: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Move the sun
steps.description: Scrub month and hour to sweep the sun path.
steps.voiceScript: Scrub the month and hour to move the sun across the sky.
steps.captionText: Scrub the month and hour to move the sun across the sky.
steps.fallbackMessage: Move the sun: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Read the losses
steps.description: Row-by-row shading loss drives the yield estimate.
steps.voiceScript: The shading loss per row feeds straight into the yield estimate.
steps.captionText: The shading loss per row feeds straight into the yield estimate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Read the losses: not visible on this screen yet.
